questions.question: 单词 'plane', 'train', 'taxi' 都属于交通工具类词汇。
questions.explanation: plane(飞机), train(火车), taxi(出租车)均属于交通工具。

questions.question: 在单词 'eraser' 前面表示 '一个' 时，应该用 'a'。
questions.explanation: eraser以元音音素开头，应用an。

questions.question: 'I am going to visit my uncle.' 表达的是将来打算做的事情。
questions.explanation: be going to结构表示计划或打算做某事。

questions.question: 'last weekend' 通常与过去式连用，不与将来时连用。
questions.explanation: last weekend意为上周末，是过去时间的标志。

questions.question: 在描述事情经过时，'Finally' 通常放在段落的最开头。
questions.explanation: Finally表示‘最后’，应放在事件描述的末尾。

questions.question: I would like ____ apple and ____ milk.
questions.explanation: apple是元音音素开头用an；milk是不可数名词用some。

questions.question: Which word doesn't belong to others? (哪一个单词不属于同一类?)
questions.explanation: 其他三项是职业，summer是季节。

questions.question: What ____ you going to do this evening?
questions.explanation: 第二人称you对应的be动词是are。

questions.question: ____, he got up. Then, he brushed his teeth.
questions.explanation: 表示事情的第一步通常用First。

questions.question: Mike likes stars. He wants to be an ____.
questions.explanation: 喜欢星星的人想当宇航员(astronaut)，且以元音开头应用an。

questions.question: Yesterday I ____ to the park. Today I ____ at home.
questions.explanation: 第一句有Yesterday用过去式；第二句有Today且主语是I用am。

questions.question: ____ comes after 'Then' in a story sequence?
questions.explanation: 在叙事逻辑中，Then之后常用After that衔接。

questions.question: ____ are you going to the party? At 7:00.
questions.explanation: 对时间提问用When。

questions.question: Sarah is going to ____ a magazine this afternoon.
questions.explanation: be going to后面跟动词原形。

questions.question: John: I'm going to be a teacher. Amy: ____.
questions.explanation: 当别人说出理想时，合适的反馈是表示赞赏。

questions.question: We are going to ____ a film tonight.
questions.explanation: 看电影固定搭配为see a film。

questions.question: First, I wash my face. ____ that, I have breakfast.
questions.explanation: After that是固定的衔接短语。

questions.question: There is ____ orange on the table.
questions.explanation: orange以元音音素开头，用an。

questions.question: Where ____ you go next Sunday?
questions.explanation: 对将来地点的询问，可用will加动词原形。

questions.question: 给下列短语进行英汉配对。
questions.explanation: A.take a trip-3.去旅行; B.go hiking-1.去远足; C.see a doctor-4.看病; D.by subway-2.乘地铁。

questions.question: 给下列逻辑连接词进行英汉配对。
questions.explanation: A.In the morning-3.在早上; B.Then-4.然后; C.Finally-2.最后; D.Yesterday-1.昨天。

questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 主语I + am going to + 动词原形swim。

questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 主语He + will be + 职业a pilot。

exam.title: Sixth Grade Second Term Final Recycle Exam

questions.question: 'an' is used before the word 'hour' because it starts with a vowel sound.
questions.explanation: hour中的h不发音，发音以元音开头，所以用an。

questions.question: 'I will to play football' is a correct sentence.
questions.explanation: will后面直接跟动词原形，不需要to。

questions.question: 'Dictionary', 'book', 'newspaper' follow the same logic as reading materials.
questions.explanation: 它们都属于阅读材料类。

questions.question: 'Instead' can be used to show the sequence of time in a story.
questions.explanation: instead表示替代，不是时间顺序连接词。

questions.question: We can use 'be going to' to talk about a dream job in the future.
questions.explanation: be going to可以用来描述未来的计划或目标。

questions.question: ____ you ____ free next Sunday morning?
questions.explanation: 将来时的疑问句Will + 主语 + 动词原形be。

questions.question: The cinema is ____ the hospital. It's next to it.
questions.explanation: 表示在...旁边用next to。

questions.question: I had a busy day. ____ I did my homework. Then I went to bed.
questions.explanation: 根据上下文，睡觉前做的最后一件事是作业，用Finally或后接Then构成的序列中有误，此处选Finally最符合结束感。

questions.question: If you want to buy some books, you can go to the ____.
questions.explanation: 买书要去书店(bookstore)。

questions.question: My father ____ a teacher next year.
questions.explanation: 明年(next year)用一般将来时，will后面接动词原形be。

questions.question: ____ are you going? To the library.
questions.explanation: 回答是地点，用Where提问。

questions.question: I want ____ an English teacher in the future.
questions.explanation: want to be... 想要成为...

questions.question: How can I get to the Fuxing Hospital? ____
questions.explanation: 询问如何到达某地，应回答交通方式或路线。

questions.question: He has ____ idea for the weekend.
questions.explanation: idea以元音音素/aɪ/开头，用an。

questions.question: Robin is a robot. He ____ eat or sleep.
questions.explanation: 机器人不需要吃和睡，eat/sleep是动词，用doesn't助动词。

questions.question: Spring, summer, autumn and ____ are four seasons.
questions.explanation: 四季包括：春夏秋冬。

questions.question: I ____ going to buy a comic book.
questions.explanation: 主语是I，be动词用am。

questions.question: ____, he went to the bookstore. Finally, he went home.
questions.explanation: 表示动作的先后顺序，常用Then。

questions.question: Childern's Day is on the first of ____.
questions.explanation: 六一儿童节在六月。

questions.question: Match the following occupations with definitions.
questions.explanation: pilot-飞行员; coach-教练; singer-歌手; writer-作家。

questions.question: Match the English phrases with Chinese.
questions.explanation: read a book-看书; clean the room-打扫房间; cook food-做饭; listen to music-听音乐。

questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 疑问词Where + be + 主语 + doing。

questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 连接词Then + 主语he + 谓语ate + 宾语dinner。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 名词的特征分类及不定冠词的选择
knowledge_summary.key_formula: a + 辅音音素开头单词; an + 元音音素开头单词(如 apple, egg, orange, hour); some + 不可数/复数
common_mistakes: 在不可数名词如milk前误用a
knowledge_summary.tips: 分类记忆词汇可以建立思维导图，如Transport, Jobs, Places等。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 使用连接词使故事表达更流畅
knowledge_summary.tips: 想象自己在讲故事，先说第一步，最后一步用Finally结尾。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 描述计划、打算或将要发生的动作
knowledge_summary.key_formula: be going to + 动词原形; will + 动词原形
common_mistakes: to后面误用动词ing或过去式
knowledge_summary.tips: 看到tomorrow, tonight, next week等时间状语时，优先考虑将来时。
